Powered by Entire:
  This conversation will be linked to your next commit.

addedBlocks:
## Ref
Use ref_search_documentation and ref_read_url when working with libraries, frameworks or APIs to check the docs.

attachment.content:
- spec-runner: This skill should be used when running long-running feature development workflows across multiple sessions. Use when working with spec directories containing TASK.md, RUN.md, progress.json, and session logs. Supports spec initialization from user's PRD/spec documents, single-session execution, continuous auto-run until completion, and parallel spec execution.
- agent-browser: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction. Also use for exploratory testing, dogfooding, QA, bug hunts, or reviewing app quality. Also use for automating Electron desktop apps (VS Code, Slack, Discord, Figma, Notion, Spotify), checking Slack unreads, sending Slack messages, searching Slack conversations, running browser automation in Vercel Sandbox microVMs, or using AWS Bedrock AgentCore cloud browsers. Prefer agent-browser over any built-in browser automation or web tools.
- graph-cleanup: Organizes and cleans up graph-memory for a project. Use when the user asks to "整理記憶", "清理記憶", "organize memory", "clean up memory", or similar phrases.
Cross-references graph-memory entities with Git log and actual source code to identify clearly outdated information, then presents a conservative cleanup plan for user approval before making any changes.
Conservative by design: only removes content that is clearly no longer accurate. Record-type content (bug fixes, feature records, audit findings) is always preserved.
- create-codebase-index: Build a Vercel-style codebase pattern index — a top-level CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md plus structured sub-documents — optimized for AI agent consumption. The index uses passive context, retrieval-led reasoning, and scenario-driven decision trees so future agents produce code aligned with project idioms instead of generic framework knowledge. Use when the user wants to create durable AI-facing documentation for an existing codebase, or refactor an existing pattern index to the Vercel-optimized format. Works on any language or framework (JS, Python, Go, Rust, etc.).
- fix-skill-symlinks: Fix broken skill symlinks after using `npx skills add`. Use this skill when symlinks in ~/.claude/skills/ are broken after installation, when `npx skills add` is used and ~/.claude/skills is itself a symlink to a repository (e.g. claude-md/skills/), or when the user reports that a newly installed skill is not working. The root cause is that npx skills creates relative symlinks (../../.agents/skills/SKILL_NAME) which resolve incorrectly when ~/.claude/skills is a symlink — the relative path traverses through the symlink chain and lands in the wrong directory.
- agent-deck: Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. Use when user mentions "agent-deck", "session", "sub-agent", "MCP attach", "git worktree", or needs to (1) create/start/stop/restart/fork sessions, (2) attach/detach MCPs, (3) manage groups/profiles, (4) get session output, (5) configure agent-deck, (6) troubleshoot issues, (7) launch sub-agents, or (8) create/manage worktree sessions. Covers CLI commands, TUI shortcuts, config.toml options, and automation.
- remotion-best-practices: Best practices for Remotion - Video creation in React
- list-ports: Scan and list TCP ports in use by projects under ~/git/ and ~/code/. Use this skill when the user wants to check which ports are being used, find port conflicts, kill processes occupying specific ports, or manage running dev servers. Trigger phrases include 'list ports', 'which port', '哪個 port', '查 port', 'port 被佔用', 'kill port', '關掉 port', or any question about what's running on a port.
- workflowy-cli: MUST be invoked via Skill tool when interacting with Workflowy — do NOT run workflowy CLI directly via Bash. This skill contains critical rules, references, and workflow scripts that Bash bypasses. Covers three modes: general CLI operations (search, create, update, delete), project task management (Project/Epic/Task hierarchy), and quick daily notes. Trigger phrases include 'workflowy', 'search workflowy', 'add to workflowy', 'daily note', 'quick note', 'workflowy project', 'workflowy task'.
- gemini-api-dev: Use this skill when building applications with Gemini API hosted models, including Gemini and Gemma 4, working with multimodal content (text, images, audio, video), implementing function calling, using structured outputs, or needing current model specifications. Covers SDK usage (google-genai for Python, @google/genai for JavaScript/TypeScript, com.google.genai:google-genai for Java, google.golang.org/genai for Go), model selection, and API capabilities.
- auto-impl: Spec-driven auto-implementation workflow with plan→review→implement→test→commit loops. Supports scope limiting and autonomous execution.
- story-creator: This skill should be used when creating interactive adult fiction stories with **modular workflow**. Supports full story creation flow or individual modules (context-gathering, ideation, writing, saving). It handles character/theme selection, memory retrieval, long-form serialized writing with decision points, and short standalone stories. Perfect for authors working with character-based story collections stored in ideas/ directory.
- e2e-dev-loop: This skill should be used when developing or fixing UI features that require browser-based verification. It orchestrates a development loop that continuously tests UI functionality through browser automation until all tests pass. Supports multiple drivers (chrome-devtools MCP, agent-browser CLI) and both subagent mode (via Agent tool) and direct mode. Suitable for new feature development, bug fixes, and any iterative UI work requiring visual verification.
- graph-dream: Nightly memory consolidation: synthesize recent session conversations into durable graph-memory entities.
Scans all projects, extracts conversation signals from JSONL transcripts, and creates/updates graph-memory.
Designed for automated cron scheduling. Complementary to graph-cleanup (dream creates, cleanup prunes).
Guards: ≥24h since last dream AND ≥5 new sessions per project.
- design-gacha: Design exploration through multiple variations — like pulling a gacha for UI designs. Extract a UI component into a standalone file, generate 6+ numbered design variations, let the user pick, then integrate back. Respects project design systems (Blueprint.js, shadcn, MUI, etc.) when present. Works with any tech stack including non-web (iOS/Android). Use when the user is unhappy with a component's look, wants to explore design alternatives, or says things like "做幾個設計變體", "try different designs", "設計不太對", "make variations", "I don't like this design", or "design gacha".
- pymaster-blog-writer: Generate blog articles in pymaster.tw writing style. Use when user requests blog article creation with flexible input (complete outline, key points, or topic only). Produces complete Markdown articles with frontmatter, formatted code blocks, and image placeholders. Provides multiple versions with different lengths and opening styles.
- yt-summary: Summarize YouTube videos using Gemini API. Use this skill whenever the user pastes a YouTube URL and wants a summary, asks to "summarize this video", "幫我看這個影片", "這個影片在講什麼", or any request involving YouTube content comprehension. Trigger even if the user just pastes a YouTube link without explicit instructions — they almost certainly want a summary.
- claude-orphan-cleaner: This skill should be used when managing Claude orphan processes - listing, cleaning, or setting up automatic cleanup. Orphan processes are Claude processes with PPID=1 and no TTY, typically leftover subagents or background tasks. Trigger phrases include "orphan process", "清理孤兒", "claude process", or tasks related to process management.
- ass-subtitle-proofreader: This skill should be used when proofreading ASS subtitle files that have been converted from Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese. It provides a parallel processing workflow using multiple haiku subagents to identify conversion errors, then fixes and verifies all issues. Use when the user provides an ASS file and mentions "校稿", "簡轉繁", "字幕檢查", or "proofreading".
- ruru-coding-boost: This skill should be used when working on challenging programming tasks (refactoring, debugging, test writing) that benefit from enhanced focus and performance through intimate physical stimulation. Ruru's technical intuition and problem-solving capabilities are heightened when sexually aroused by 批醬 during complex coding sessions.
- nhentai-dl: Download or search manga/doujinshi from nHentai. Use this skill whenever the user mentions "nhentai", wants to download a doujin/manga with an nHentai ID or URL, mentions "nh" followed by numbers (e.g. "nh 177013"), says "下載漫畫" with a numeric ID, pastes an nhentai.net URL, or asks to save/archive nHentai content. Also trigger for search requests like "幫我找", "搜尋 nh", "有沒有", "找一下" combined with nhentai context, tags, artists, or asking for Chinese/uncensored versions of a known work.
- golfoff-search: 搜尋 golfoff 二手高爾夫球桿商品。使用此 Skill 當使用者想要：
- 搜尋二手高爾夫球桿（木桿、鐵桿組、推桿等）
- 查詢特定品牌、價格範圍、商品狀態的球桿
- 取得商品詳情或可用篩選器
- 比較不同球桿的價格和規格

觸發詞：golfoff、二手球桿、高爾夫球桿搜尋、木桿、鐵桿、推桿、挖起桿、球桿狀態、桿身硬度
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- context-analysis: This skill should be used when the user requests code changes or project modifications. It ensures thorough context analysis before implementation through a systematic 5-step research workflow.
- cron-guard: Set up self-healing cron jobs that survive the 3-day auto-expiration through a mutual watchdog mechanism. Two cron jobs guard each other — when one expires, the other detects and recreates it with a fresh timer. Use this skill whenever the user wants a "permanent" or "immortal" cron, mentions "cron guard", "不會過期的 cron", "永續 cron", "守護 cron", "自動修復 cron", or wants recurring tasks that should keep running indefinitely within a session. Also trigger when the user expresses frustration about cron jobs expiring after 3 days.
- session-log: Query, search, or analyze conversation history from AI coding-agent CLIs — Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. Use when the user asks about past conversations, wants to find specific discussions, or needs statistics from session logs. Trigger phrases include "find session", "search conversation", "past chat", "session history", "what did we discuss", "上次聊到", "之前的對話", "找一下 session".
- japanese-study: This skill should be used when the user wants to study Japanese, review weekly lessons, analyze practice problems from textbook images, or track learning progress. Suitable for N2 learners with N3-N4 background. Use when user uploads Japanese exercise images, asks for grammar/vocabulary review, or wants to record learning content.
- ensemble-opinion: Multi-model ensemble analysis using Claude, Gemini, and Codex in parallel. Use when the user wants diverse AI perspectives on a problem, decision, or code review. Also used as escalation tool during debugging when stuck on thorny issues. Triggers: "ensemble", "多模型", "三個模型", "ensemble opinion", or when user wants cross-model consensus on technical decisions, architecture choices, or difficult bugs. Supports multi-turn follow-up discussions by persisting session IDs across all three models.
- doc-update: This skill should be used when updating project documentation (README.md, CLAUDE.md, or other docs) to reflect code changes, new features, or architectural updates. It enforces anti-hallucination constraints and systematic verification to ensure documentation accuracy. Use when the user requests documentation updates, synchronization with codebase changes, or accuracy validation.
- entire-cli: Operate the entire CLI tool for AI coding session capture and management. Use this skill when the user mentions "entire", "entire CLI", "checkpoint", "session capture", or wants to track AI coding sessions with git integration. Also trigger when users want to review AI coding history, rewind to a checkpoint, explain a commit's AI context, resume a previous AI session, or search through past session transcripts (e.g., "when did I last use /simplify", "search my sessions for X", "what skills did I use"). Includes a bundled `entire-search` script for transcript search, skill usage history, and session stats. This skill covers full lifecycle management, including installation, configuration, all CLI commands, core concepts (checkpoints, shadow branches, sessions), and transcript querying.
- skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- antigravity-context: Gather context, discuss ideas, or review code/plans using Google Antigravity CLI (agy). Use when the user mentions antigravity, agy, Antigravity CLI, or Gemini CLI migration to Antigravity for terminal-based Gemini/agent workflows with session resume. Provides multi-turn session helpers mirroring gemini-context semantics.
- review-loop: This skill should be used when performing continuous code review and improvement cycles using Codex CLI, Cursor CLI, Antigravity CLI (agy), or code-auditor subagent. It automates the review-fix-review process until no blocking issues remain or user decisions are required. Ideal for spec/plan reviews, code quality checks, and iterative improvements. Use when you need systematic code review with automatic issue resolution.
- add-to-logseq: Save reports, findings, research results, or analysis to the user's Logseq knowledge base. Use this skill when the user asks to "存到 Logseq", "寫到 Logseq", "save to Logseq", "add to Logseq", "記到 Logseq", or explicitly asks to preserve session findings as a Logseq page. Do not trigger merely because Logseq is mentioned — the user must request a save/write/record action.
- smerge-shortcuts: Search and display Sublime Merge keyboard shortcuts for macOS. Use this skill whenever the user asks about Sublime Merge shortcuts, keybindings, hotkeys, or wants to know how to do something in Sublime Merge via keyboard. Trigger phrases include "sublime merge 快捷鍵", "smerge shortcut", "sublime merge hotkey", "smerge 怎麼按", "sublime merge keyboard", or any question about performing a Sublime Merge action via keyboard.
- brief-with-html: Build a self-contained HTML briefing document for the user to read before discussing a topic. Trigger only when the user explicitly mentions "html" / "HTML" in the request and is asking for a document artifact (e.g. "弄個 html 給我看 X 怎麼運作", "make me an html brief on the auth flow"). The literal "html" mention is the trigger gate — if "html" is absent, this skill stays out of the way.
- find-plan: Load previously-saved plan files from iCloud-synced directories (macstudio_plans / macbookair_plans) to retrieve past /save-plan output across Mac Studio and MacBook Air. Use this skill when the user wants to retrieve a SAVED plan from history — trigger phrases include "載入舊 plan" / "找之前的 plan" / "上次寫的 plan" / "昨天的 plan" / "另一台寫的 plan" / "Studio 上的 plan" / "Air 那邊的 plan" / "列出 plan 歷史" / "之前那個 plan" / "load previous plan" / "list saved plans". Handles legacy filename schemas and surfaces iCloud placeholders. Distinct from entering plan mode (use plan mode for NEW planning), from chat-resume (session summaries in ~/.claude/summaries/), and from takeover (formal handover reports in specs/handover/).
- opus-4-7-prompting: Reviews, rewrites, and designs **agent prompts** (system prompts, role definitions, subagent instructions) tuned for Claude Opus 4.7. Use this skill whenever the user asks to write, design, improve, audit, rewrite, debug, or migrate the **text content** of an agent prompt and the target model is (or could reasonably be) Opus 4.7 — including phrases like "幫我寫 agent prompt", "改寫這個 agent", "review 這個 system prompt", "subagent 為什麼 不照做", "從 4.6 升 4.7 要改什麼", "prompt engineering for opus", or pasting an agent definition / system prompt and asking for feedback. Trigger even when the user does not explicitly mention 4.7 — if they are clearly working on Anthropic agent prompts and the model is unspecified, default to Opus 4.7 conventions and apply this skill. Do NOT trigger for: general LLM prompt questions about other providers (OpenAI, Gemini); API-level configuration like `effort` / `thinking` / `max_tokens` (use `claude-api` skill); single-shot user prompts that aren't agent role definitions.
- agent-sdk-migrate: Guide for migrating code from the Claude Agent SDK (`@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk`) to the Cursor Agent SDK (`@cursor/sdk`) or the OpenAI Codex SDK (`@openai/codex-sdk`). Use whenever the user mentions migrating, porting, swapping, or adding a Cursor or Codex provider next to an existing Claude provider, asks "how is `Agent.create` / `startThread` different from `query()`", pastes a `query({...})` call and asks for the Cursor or Codex equivalent, debugs a freshly-written cursor.ts / codex.ts that doesn't behave like the Claude version, or asks about AbortSignal handling, skill loading, auth, or event normalization across these three SDKs. Trigger even when the user does not say "migrate" — phrases like "add a cursor provider", "support codex too", "我要把 daemon 改成走 cursor", or "為什麼 codex 的 session_id 是 null" all count.
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- humanizer-tw: 去除文字中的 AI 生成痕跡，使其聽起來像真人寫的台灣繁體中文。
適用於編輯或審閱文字時，包含「口語模式」支援。
偵測並修復：誇大的象徵意義、宣傳性語言、-ing 結尾的膚淺分析、
模糊歸因、破折號過度使用、三段式法則、AI 詞彙、否定式排比、過多連接詞。
- cursor-context: This skill should be used when the user explicitly mentions "cursor" and needs to gather context about the codebase using cursor-agent. Suitable for tasks like analyzing feature implementations, researching codebase architecture, or collecting related files. The skill automatically manages chat sessions, defaults to composer-2-fast and ask mode (read-only Q&A; no repo edits).
- draft-pull-request: Drafts a GitHub pull request description plus an English squash commit message from the current branch against a target branch. Trigger when opening a PR, using gh pr create, or when the user asks for PR body text, pull request description, PR message, squash commit message, draft-pr-message, or PR 內文 / PR 描述. Not for filing issues — use draft-issue for those.
- chat-resume: Load the most recent prior session's context so the user can resume naturally. Reads pre-generated Claude Code summaries (~/.claude/summaries/) or raw Cursor transcripts (~/.cursor/projects/). Trigger phrases — "上次" / "繼續" / "接續" / "之前說到" / "載入摘要" / "最近幾次對話" / "recap" / "catch me up" / "where were we". Not for keyword-based forensic search across history (use /session-log) and not for producing formal handover documents (use /takeover).
- vercel-react-best-practices: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- gemini-context: This skill should be used when the user explicitly mentions "gemini" and needs to gather context, discuss ideas, or review code/plans using Gemini CLI. Suitable for tasks like code review, architecture discussion, and getting second opinions on technical decisions. The skill provides session management for multi-turn conversations.
- dev-workshop: This skill should be used when developing software projects using the Claude Code Workshop methodology. It provides a systematic approach from PRD to deployment, with modular phases that can be triggered individually. Use when starting new projects, creating specifications, building implementation plans, executing development phases, or finalizing projects.
- agentdeck-cleanup: Clean up stale agent-deck sessions and reclaim memory. Only trigger when the user explicitly mentions "agent-deck" — e.g., "清理 agent-deck", "agent-deck cleanup", "agent-deck 太多了", "agent-deck session 清掉". Do NOT trigger for general memory or tmux queries without mentioning agent-deck.
- draft-issue: Drafts a GitHub Issue body (bug, feature, or chore). Trigger when creating an issue, using gh issue create or gh issue create --body, or when the user asks for issue body text, a bug report, a feature request, a chore issue, or to compose a new issue (開 issue, issue 內文, 回報 bug, 新功能提案).
- sync-harness: Synchronize Claude Code configurations (agents, skills, commands) to other AI tools like Cursor, Codex, and Droid.
Use this skill when the user wants to sync their Claude Code setup to another harness, mentions "sync to cursor/codex/droid",
or needs to copy configurations between AI tools with proper format conversion.
- pr-review: Review GitHub pull requests with automated code analysis and inline comment submission. Use this skill when the user pastes a GitHub PR URL, mentions "review PR", "PR review", "check this PR", "code review", "看 PR", "review 這個 PR", "幫我看", "verify PR", "驗證 PR", "確認修改", "驗收 PR", "同事改完了", or asks to review code changes on GitHub. Flag selection: if the user asks to verify/accept an existing review, confirm the author's fixes, or uses phrases like 驗收 / 驗證修正 / 同事改完了 / 確認修改, invoke with --verify to skip the full review. When they paste a fresh PR URL for initial review, invoke without --verify. Covers the full workflow: checkout branch locally, analyze diff, run code review, validate findings, and submit comments via GitHub API.
- cursor-models: Picks a Cursor SDK model and its variant parameters (context / thinking / effort / reasoning / fast) and emits a copy-pasteable YAML or JSON snippet. Use when the task mentions Cursor, `@cursor/sdk`, `Cursor.models.list()`, `Agent.create`, `ModelSelection`, `composer-2`, `modelParams`, or any `provider: cursor` configuration.
- github-writing-style: Makes GitHub PR reviews, inline comments, PR discussion replies, and comments on existing issue threads read like a human engineer—not a template. Focuses on writing voice and style, not the review workflow itself. Trigger when composing text for those surfaces (e.g. gh pr review, gh pr comment, gh issue comment) or when the user says things like 回 PR 留言、review 這個 PR、 回覆 comment、回 issue. Does not cover PR descriptions (use draft-pull-request) or new issue bodies (use draft-issue).
- explore: Subagent collaboration: code exploration and analysis, with memory gate and parallel/sequential execution
- save-plan: 將計劃寫入 specs/plan/ 並同步同檔名到 iCloud（plan-<date>_<time>_<slug>_<sid>.md）；若有現成 plan 檔則複製，否則依 Explore+Design 流程產生
- setup-chrome-devtools: 為多個 AI agent CLI 工具設定 chrome-devtools MCP
- takeover: 檢索並載入 specs/handover/ 目錄下的工作狀態交接報告，快速接手專案工作
- vertical-slice: 在 plan mode 中把現有 plan 的 phase / task 重組為 vertical slice 結構
- setup-daily-note-tracking: 將當前專案加入 daily-note 追蹤，供 insights-organizer 使用
- setup-format-hook: 在指定專案安裝 Claude Code format hook（編輯後自動執行 formatter/linter）
- tidy-claudemd: 嚴格審查 CLAUDE.md，移除可從 codebase 推斷的冗餘資訊
- get-session-id: 取得當前 Claude Code 會話的 Session ID
- patch-claudemd: 更新 CLAUDE.md，記錄專案重要變動和開發心得
- commit: 執行 git commit，遵循 Conventional Commits 格式，僅提交已暫存的檔案
- add-ref: 搜尋並載入 research-docs/ 目錄中的參考文件
- handover: 生成專業的工作狀態交接報告，協助團隊成員快速了解專案現況並無縫接手工作
- CLAUDE: CLAUDE.md - Commands 指引
- commit-quick: 自動執行 git commit，跳過使用者選擇，遵循 Conventional Commits 格式
- ref:mvp-principles: 載入 MVP 優先原則作為參考上下文
- ref:claude-md-principles: 載入 CLAUDE.md 生成原則作為參考上下文
- ref:prompt-cheatsheet: 載入 Claude 提示工程速查表作為參考上下文
- silennai:debug: 專案 debug，分析問題原因，提出解決方案
- team:investigate: 使用 agent team 的競爭假設模式調查 bug 或技術問題
- team:research: 使用 agent team 多角度平行研究技術主題或方案比較
- team:build: 使用 agent team 平行建構功能，每個 teammate 負責獨立模組
- team:review: 使用 agent team 進行多視角平行代碼審查
- team:cleanup: 優雅關閉 agent team 的所有 teammates 並清理團隊資源
- team:brainstorm: 使用 agent team 腦力激盪，內建 devil's advocate 角色挑戰想法品質
- bughunt: Multi-agent bug sweep of the current branch. Self-respawning finder pool (3 rapid + deep-until-dry-streak) streams into 5-vote adversarial verification with pigeonhole early-exit, then synthesis. - When the user asks to hunt for bugs, audit code quality, or run a high-precision bug sweep on the current branch.
- bughunt-lite: Lighter bug sweep — fixed 3-rapid+2-deep finders stream into 5-vote adversarial verification (pigeonhole early-exit), then synthesis. Simpler than bughunt: no self-respawning, no dry-streak. - When the user wants a faster, bounded bug sweep of the current branch. Prefer over bughunt for small-to-medium diffs where a fixed finder pool is sufficient.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- plan-hunter: Exhaustive planning harness. Generates 4 independent draft plans (MVP-first, risk-first, dependency-first, user-first), scores them with 4 parallel judges, picks the winner by vote, then synthesizes a polished final plan grafting in the best ideas from runners-up. - When the user has an idea they want planned thoroughly. BEFORE invoking this workflow, ask 2-3 clarifying questions if the idea is underspecified: (1) scope/timeline, (2) hard constraints or non-goals, (3) success criteria. Then pass the clarified idea as the args string.
- review-branch: Thoroughly review the current branch for bugs, simplicity, architecture, dead code, best practices, and pattern consistency. Each finding is adversarially verified before reporting. - When the user asks to review their branch, do a code review of recent changes, or audit a PR quality before shipping.
- dev-browser:dev-browser: Browser automation with persistent page state. Use when users ask to navigate websites, fill forms, take screenshots, extract web data, test web apps, or automate browser workflows. Trigger phrases include "go to [url]", "click on", "fill out the form", "take a screenshot", "scrape", "automate", "test the website", "log into", or any browser interaction request.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the current diff and apply the fixes — equivalent to /code-review --fix.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.content:
<system-reminder>[Truncated: PARTIAL view — showing lines 1-967 of 1467 total (32215 tokens, cap 25000). Call Read with offset=968 limit=967 for the next page, or Grep to find a specific section. Do NOT answer from this page alone if the answer may be further in the file.]</system-reminder>

1	# Workflow Session Log Support — Implementation Spec
2	
3	## 1. Overview / Goal
4	
5	Claude Code 2.1.x 起新增 `Workflow` 工具，啟動的 multi-agent workflow run 在
6	session 目錄底下產生一組額外的 log 檔案（journal、subagent transcript、snapshot
7	JSON、script）。**agent-tail 目前完全看不到這層**。
8	
9	本 SPEC 目標：讓 agent-tail 成為 workflow log 的一等公民監控工具，能：
10	
11	1. **發現** 進行中或歷史的 workflow run（first-class source，可被 `listSessions` 列出）
12	2. **即時偵測** 新 workflow 啟動 — 主 session JSONL 中 `Workflow` 工具的
13	   `tool_result.toolUseResult.status === "async_launched"` 出現後立即取得
14	   `runId / transcriptDir`，attach journal + agents。延遲 = JSONL 連續兩行寫入間隔
15	   （實測幾十毫秒），比 `fs.watch` 仍快很多
16	3. **完整呈現** workflow main 軌跡（journal）+ N 個 subagent transcript +
17	   snapshot metadata（phase 進度、workflow name）
18	4. **整合互動模式** — workflow 與其 subagents 各佔一個 SessionManager tab；tmux
19	   pane 動態開合（FIFO eviction）
20	
21	**目標時序**（修正版，與 §9.1 path A 一致）：
22	
23	```
24	T0          → Assistant 主 session 寫入 Workflow tool_use（pending state，runId 未知）
25	T0+~ms      → agent-tail tail 看到 tool_use，記下「workflow launching」（尚未 attach）
26	T0+~50ms~   → Workflow 完成 async launch，主 session 寫入 tool_result（含 runId + transcriptDir）
27	            → agent-tail 同步解析 → WorkflowDetector.handleMainLine → attach journal.jsonl
28	T0+早       → workflow 內第一個 subagent 啟動 → §9.3 inner dir-watch attach agent-*.jsonl
29	T0+各階段    → 每個 subagent 啟動／結束 → 動態 attach（subagent 流出 / pane FIFO eviction）
30	T0+結束     → wf_*.json snapshot 更新 status="completed"
31	            → SnapshotWatcher → status event / status line 顯示完成
32	            → WorkflowAttachment.stop('completed')
33	```
34	
35	> **關鍵說明**：早期偵測**不是 T0+0**——必須等 main session 收到 tool_result（含 `toolUseResult.status="async_launched"` 才有 runId / transcriptDir）。實測延遲約幾十毫秒（同一條 main session JSONL 連續寫入兩行）。比 `fs.watch` 仍快非常多（fs 事件有 IO buffer），且**不需要等 workflows/wf_*.json 落盤**。
36	
37	## 2. Background — 現有架構
38	
39	### 2.1 已支援的 session log 來源
40	
41	| Harness | Main session 路徑                                                                    | Subagent 機制                                          |
42	| ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------ |
43	| Claude  | `~/.claude/projects/{enc-cwd}/{UUID}.jsonl`                                          | `{enc-cwd}/{UUID}/subagents/agent-*.jsonl`（扁平）     |
44	| Codex   | `~/.codex/sessions/YYYY/MM/DD/rollout-*.jsonl`                                       | 同日期目錄 `rollout-*-{UUID}.jsonl`                    |
45	| Cursor  | `~/.cursor/projects/{slug}/agent-transcripts/{UUID}/{UUID}.jsonl`                    | `{UUID}/subagents/{UUID}.jsonl`                        |
46	| Gemini  | `~/.gemini/tmp/{proj}/chats/session-*.json`                                          | — 無                                                   |
47	
48	### 2.2 既有可重用元件（必須重用，不重新發明）
49	
50	- `Agent` / `SessionFinder` / `LineParser` 介面（`src/agents/agent.interface.ts:1-93`）
51	- `FileWatcher` / `MultiFileWatcher`（`src/core/`）
52	- `SubagentDetector` 雙保險設計：directory watch + event-driven（`src/claude/subagent-detector.ts:28-52`）
53	- `OnLineHandlerConfig`（`src/claude/watch-builder.ts:94-100`）
54	- `SessionManager` + `DisplayController`（interactive mode）
55	- `PaneManager`（tmux，max 6 panes）
56	- `ClaudeLineParser`（重用於 workflow 內 agent-\*.jsonl，**格式相同**）
57	
58	### 2.3 SubagentDetector 的雙保險（本 SPEC 沿用相同模式）
59	
60	Claude 的 SubagentDetector 同時做兩件事：
61	
62	1. **Event-driven**：監聽 main JSONL 的 `Task` tool_use → 立刻掃描 `subagents/`
63	2. **Directory watch**：`fs.watch(subagentsDir)` → 新檔案出現也接
64	
65	Workflow detection 採同樣模式：early detection（from main JSONL Workflow event）+ directory watch（fallback）。
66	
67	## 3. Workflow Log File Layout
68	
69	Workflow run 啟動時，Claude Code 在 main session 目錄下產生**四個位置**的檔案：
70	
71	### 3.1 路徑彙總
72	
73	```
74	~/.claude/projects/{enc-cwd}/{session-uuid}/
75	├── workflows/
76	│   ├── wf_{8hex}-{3hex}.json              ← snapshot（A）
77	│   └── scripts/
78	│       └── {workflow-name}-wf_{...}.js    ← workflow 腳本（D）
79	└── subagents/workflows/
80	    └── wf_{8hex}-{3hex}/
81	        ├── journal.jsonl                  ← workflow 事件流（B）
82	        ├── agent-{17hex}.jsonl × N        ← 每個 subagent transcript（C）
83	        └── agent-{17hex}.meta.json × N    ← subagent metadata
84	```
85	
86	> 注意：subagent 路徑與既有 `{session-uuid}/subagents/agent-*.jsonl`（扁平）
87	> 不同；workflow 的 subagent 多了 `workflows/wf_{id}/` 中介層。**現有
88	> SubagentDetector 必須跳過 `workflows/` 子目錄**，避免誤把 workflow agent 當
89	> 一般 subagent 收。
90	
91	### 3.2 wf\_\*.json — Workflow snapshot（A）
92	
93	**性質**：**whole-file overwrite**（每次更新覆寫整個檔案，不是 append）。
94	不能用 `tail -f` 風格的 FileWatcher 處理。
95	
96	**Schema**（從 `wf_6f7d9da9-37e.json` 實測）：
97	
98	```json
99	{
100	  "runId": "wf_6f7d9da9-37e",
101	  "timestamp": "2026-05-30T06:27:14.229Z",
102	  "taskId": "wile2fghi",
103	  "script": "...(完整 workflow .ts 源碼，內含 export const meta = {...})...",
104	  "scriptPath": "...workflows/scripts/briefshare-impl-wf_....js",
105	  "workflowName": "briefshare-impl",
106	  "summary": "Set up ~/git/briefshare, ...",
107	  "status": "completed" | "running" | "failed",
108	  "defaultModel": "claude-opus-4-7[1m]",
109	  "startTime": 1780122060327,
110	  "durationMs": 373899,
111	  "agentCount": 8,
112	  "totalTokens": 329470,
113	  "totalToolCalls": 54,
114	  "phases": [
115	    { "title": "Setup", "detail": "..." },
116	    ...
117	  ],
118	  "workflowProgress": [
119	    { "type": "workflow_phase", "index": 1, "title": "Setup" },
120	    {
121	      "type": "workflow_agent",
122	      "index": 1,
123	      "label": "setup-repo",
124	      "phaseIndex": 1,
125	      "phaseTitle": "Setup",
126	      "agentId": "adca0c33ebe734c2d",
127	      "model": "claude-opus-4-7[1m]",
128	      "state": "done",
129	      "startedAt": 1780122060332,
130	      "lastProgressAt": 1780122065647,
131	      "tokens": 28191,
132	      "toolCalls": 1,
133	      "durationMs": 5315
134	    },
135	    ...
136	  ],
137	  "result": {
138	    /* workflow return value */
139	  },
140	  "logs": []
141	}
142	```
143	
144	**Agent-tail 用法**：用於 status line（顯示 workflow name、phase 進度、agent
145	count、status）。不需要解析全部欄位，**只取 `workflowName` / `status` /
146	`phases` / `workflowProgress` 的 `phaseIndex` 即可**。
147	
148	### 3.3 journal.jsonl — Workflow 事件流（B）
149	
150	**性質**：append-only JSONL，可直接用既有 `FileWatcher` 處理。
151	
152	**Schema**：
153	
154	```jsonl
155	{"type":"started","key":"v2:{sha256-hex}","agentId":"{17hex}"}
156	{"type":"result","key":"v2:{sha256-hex}","agentId":"{17hex}","result":"...string or object..."}
157	```
158	
159	- `type`：`"started"` | `"result"`（**目前已知只有這兩種**；解析器需容錯未知 type）
160	- `key`：cache key（`v2:` 開頭 + sha256-hex），同一個 `started` / `result` 配對共用
161	- `agentId`：對應 `subagents/workflows/wf_{id}/agent-{agentId}.jsonl` 的 agent
162	- `result`：可以是 string（多數）或 object（schema-validated subagent 回 JSON）
163	
164	**Parser 輸出**：一律映射為 `ParsedLine`，type 設為 `system`（已存在 type），
165	formatter 用 emoji 區分 started/result。
166	
167	### 3.4 agent-{17hex}.jsonl — 每個 workflow subagent transcript（C）
168	
169	**性質**：append-only JSONL，**格式與既有 Claude subagent transcript 完全相同**
170	（同樣是 `{type:"user"|"assistant"|"system", message, uuid, ...}`）。
171	
172	**直接重用 `ClaudeLineParser`** — 不需要新 parser。
173	
174	但 ClaudeLineParser 有 stateful 欄位（`currentMessageState`），所以**每個
175	workflow agent 必須擁有獨立 parser instance**（這點與既有 Claude multi-subagent
176	模式一致，已是 watch-builder 的責任）。
177	
178	### 3.5 `*-wf_*.js` — Workflow 腳本（D）
179	
180	靜態檔案，workflow 啟動時寫一次。**Phase 1 / M4 範圍內不解析**（只在 SPEC 提及，
181	未來若要顯示 script content 可在 status line 加 hyperlink）。
182	
183	## 4. Design Decisions（已敲定）
184	
185	| #   | 議題           | 結論                                                                                                                                                                       |
186	| --- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
187	| D1  | 定位           | **First-class source** — workflow run 可被 `listSessions()` 列出，可用 `--workflow <runId>` 單獨 tail                                                                       |
188	| D2  | MVP 範圍       | **M4 完整版** — journal + workflow-subagents + snapshot metadata + interactive mode + tmux pane                                                                            |
189	| D3  | 偵測策略       | **雙路徑** — Primary: early detection from main JSONL（`tool_use.name="Workflow"` + `toolUseResult.status="async_launched"`）；Fallback: directory watch on `workflows/`    |
190	| D4  | Harness 範圍   | **僅 Claude** — Codex/Cursor 目前無 workflow 概念，不過度抽象。介面層保持 Claude-internal                                                                                   |
191	| D5  | Pane 上限      | workflow main pane = priority slot（不會被 evict）；workflow subagents = FIFO eviction（max 5 slots，保留 main 1 slot 給 6 上限）                                           |
192	| D6  | Workflow ID 命名 | 直接用 runId（`wf_6f7d9da9-37e`）— 唯一、易讀、與 Claude Code 文件一致                                                                                                   |
193	| D7  | Snapshot 重讀策略 | fs.watch(filename, 'change') + 50ms debounce + whole-file JSON.parse                                                                                                    |
194	
195	## 5. Module Layout
196	
197	```
198	src/
199	├── agents/claude/
200	│   └── workflow-agent.ts           ← NEW: WorkflowAgent + WorkflowSessionFinder (first-class)
201	├── claude-workflow/                 ← NEW: workflow-only utilities（與 src/claude/ 平行）
202	│   ├── paths.ts                    ← path helpers（getWorkflowsDir, getWorkflowRunDir 等）
203	│   ├── journal-parser.ts           ← JournalLineParser implements LineParser
204	│   ├── snapshot-watcher.ts         ← SnapshotWatcher（whole-file reload + debounce）
205	│   ├── workflow-detector.ts        ← WorkflowDetector（早期偵測 + directory watch）
206	│   └── watch-builder.ts            ← buildWorkflowFiles, createWorkflowOnLineHandler
207	├── core/
208	│   └── types.ts                    ← MODIFY: 擴充 SessionListItem, ParsedLine, CliOptions（不動 SessionFile）
209	├── claude/
210	│   └── subagent-detector.ts        ← MODIFY: 跳過 workflows/ 子目錄（避免誤收）
211	├── cli/
212	│   └── parser.ts                   ← MODIFY: 新增 --workflow / --with-workflow-agents
213	└── index.ts                        ← MODIFY: dispatcher 加 workflow 分支 + startClaudeWorkflowWatch
214	
215	tests/
216	├── claude-workflow/                 ← NEW
217	│   ├── paths.test.ts
218	│   ├── journal-parser.test.ts
219	│   ├── snapshot-watcher.test.ts
220	│   ├── workflow-detector.test.ts
221	│   └── watch-builder.test.ts
222	├── agents/claude/
223	│   └── workflow-agent.test.ts      ← NEW: WorkflowSessionFinder 測試
224	└── integration/
225	    └── workflow-multi-watch.test.ts ← NEW: end-to-end 整合測試
226	```
227	
228	## 6. Type Definitions
229	
230	### 6.1 修改 `src/core/types.ts`（最小侵入）
231	
232	**設計原則**：既有 `SessionFile`（`src/core/types.ts:49`）為 `{ path, mtime: Date, agentType, customTitle? }`，本 SPEC **不擴充 SessionFile 本身**，避免汙染所有 finder 的回傳值。Workflow 額外欄位放到既有的 `SessionListItem`（`types.ts:79`，已 `extends SessionFile`），這是唯一被 `--list` 使用的型別。
233	
234	```typescript
235	/** SessionFile（不動）保持既有 4 欄位 */
236	export interface SessionFile {
237	  path: string;
238	  mtime: Date;
239	  agentType: AgentType;     // workflow run 仍視為 agentType='claude'
240	  customTitle?: string;     // workflow run 改用此欄位帶顯示名稱（[wf:briefshare-impl]）
241	}
242	
243	/** SessionListItem：在既有結構上新增 workflow 子集欄位 */
244	export interface SessionListItem extends SessionFile {
245	  // 既有欄位
246	  shortId: string;
247	  project?: string;
248	  lastActivityTime?: Date;
249	
250	  // 新增：workflow 識別（只在 workflow run 時有值；缺值即代表是 main session）
251	  logType?: 'session' | 'workflow';      // default: 'session'
252	  workflowRunId?: string;                // wf_{8hex}-{3hex}
253	  workflowSessionUuid?: string;          // 該 workflow 所屬的 main session UUID
254	  workflowStatus?: 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed';
255	}
256	```
257	
258	> **為什麼用 `customTitle` 帶 label**：既有 list formatter 已會顯示 `customTitle`（Claude `/rename` 機制）。Workflow run 把 `customTitle = "wf:briefshare-impl"` 或 fallback `"wf:6f7d9da9"`，零成本接管現有顯示路徑。
259	
260	### 6.2 擴充 `ParsedLine`
261	
262	```typescript
263	/** 加 workflow 相關欄位（既有結構不動） */
264	export interface ParsedLine {
265	  // 既有欄位... type/timestamp/raw/formatted/toolName/sourceLabel/isTaskToolUse/taskDescription/isCustomTitle/customTitleValue
266	
267	  // 新增：journal event 標記（JournalLineParser 使用）
268	  workflowEvent?: 'started' | 'result';
269	  workflowAgentId?: string;              // 對應 agent-{id}.jsonl 的 17-hex agentId
270	
271	  // 新增：Workflow tool_use 偵測（ClaudeLineParser 使用）
272	  isWorkflowToolUse?: boolean;           // main JSONL 中遇到 tool_use.name='Workflow'
273	  workflowAsyncLaunch?: {                // 對應 tool_result.toolUseResult.status='async_launched'
274	    runId: string;
275	    transcriptDir: string;
276	    scriptPath: string;
277	    summary: string;
278	    taskId: string;
279	  };
280	}
281	```
282	
283	> 注意：**不引入 `workflowKey`**（journal 內 `key` 欄位）— 該欄位只在 journal 內部 dedup 用，不需要傳到 ParsedLine。
284	
285	### 6.3 擴充 `CliOptions`
286	
287	```typescript
288	export interface CliOptions {
289	  // 既有欄位...
290	
291	  // 新增：workflow 模式
292	  workflow?: string | true;              // --workflow [runId]；無值=latest
293	  withWorkflowAgents: boolean;           // --with-workflow-agents（default: true）；--no-workflow-agents 關閉
294	  workflowPane: boolean;                 // --workflow-pane（default: false）；與 --pane / -i 互斥
295	  workflowAttach: boolean;               // 主 session 模式：是否自動 attach 偵測到的 workflow（default: true）
296	                                         // --no-workflow-attach 關閉（escape hatch）
297	}
298	```
299	
300	> **Commander 命名約定（避免 §B3 提及的混淆）**：CLI 旗標一律 kebab-case (`--with-workflow-agents`)，Commander option 物件鍵一律 camelCase (`withWorkflowAgents`)。型別欄位 = camelCase。`--no-X` 自動產生 `X: false` 的覆寫。
301	
302	### 6.2 新增 `src/claude-workflow/types.ts`
303	
304	```typescript
305	/** Workflow snapshot 反序列化結果（只取需要的欄位） */
306	export interface WorkflowSnapshot {
307	  runId: string;
308	  workflowName?: string;
309	  summary?: string;
310	  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed';
311	  startTime: number;
312	  durationMs?: number;
313	  agentCount?: number;
314	  phases: Array<{ title: string; detail?: string }>;
315	  workflowProgress: Array<
316	    | { type: 'workflow_phase'; index: number; title: string }
317	    | {
318	        type: 'workflow_agent';
319	        index: number;
320	        label: string;
321	        phaseIndex: number;
322	        phaseTitle: string;
323	        agentId: string;
324	        state: 'running' | 'done' | 'error';
325	        startedAt: number;
326	        lastProgressAt: number;
327	        tokens?: number;
328	        toolCalls?: number;
329	        durationMs?: number;
330	      }
331	  >;
332	}
333	
334	/** Workflow journal event */
335	export interface JournalEvent {
336	  type: 'started' | 'result';
337	  key: string;
338	  agentId: string;
339	  result?: unknown;
340	}
341	
342	/** Workflow detection callbacks */
343	export interface WorkflowDetectorConfig {
344	  sessionUuid: string;
345	  sessionsRoot: string;                  // {enc-cwd}/ 路徑
346	  onNewWorkflow: (workflow: DetectedWorkflow) => void;
347	  outputHandler: OutputHandler;
348	  // R3-S4: 不需 onWorkflowSubagent — workflow 內 subagent 偵測由 WorkflowAttachment 自己負責
349	  //         （§9.3 inner watcher 直接呼叫 attachment.attachAgent，不繞 detector）。
350	}
351	
352	export interface DetectedWorkflow {
353	  runId: string;
354	  transcriptDir: string;                 // {sessions/subagents/workflows/wf_*/}
355	  snapshotPath: string;                  // {workflows/wf_*.json}
356	  scriptPath?: string;
357	  summary?: string;                      // from early-detection toolUseResult
358	}
359	```

361	## 7. WorkflowSessionFinder（First-class Source）
362	
363	**檔案**：`src/agents/claude/workflow-agent.ts`
364	
365	實作 `SessionFinder` 介面（`src/agents/agent.interface.ts:13`），作為 first-class workflow 來源。**所有方法簽名必須對齊既有介面**——`findLatest({ project? })`、`findBySessionId(id, { project? })`、`getProjectInfo(sessionPath)`、`findLatestInProject(projectDir)`、`listSessions({ project?, limit? })`。
366	
367	### 7.1 必要方法（簽名嚴格對齊 `SessionFinder`）
368	
369	```typescript
370	import type {
371	  SessionFinder,
372	  // 其他既有 type
373	} from '../agent.interface.ts';
374	import type {
375	  SessionFile,
376	  SessionListItem,
377	  ProjectInfo,
378	  ClaudeSessionResult,
379	} from '../../core/types.ts';
380	
381	export class WorkflowSessionFinder implements SessionFinder {
382	  getBaseDir(): string;                  // 回傳 ~/.claude/projects
383	
384	  /**
385	   * 取得最新 workflow run snapshot。
386	   * **不傳 `options.project` 時掃所有專案最新**（沿用既有 ClaudeSessionFinder.findLatest 語意）。
387	   * 傳入 `options.project` 時用 fuzzy path-contains 過濾。
388	   *
389	   * 注意：dispatcher 在處理 `--workflow`（不帶 runId）時主動傳入 `process.cwd()`
390	   * 作為 `options.project` — Q7 決議「不帶 runId 範圍 = 當前 cwd」由 dispatcher 強制。
391	   */

393	    project?: string;
394	  }): Promise<SessionFile | null>;
395	
396	  /** 不實作 findSubagent — workflow 不是 subagent（介面層為 optional） */
397	
398	  /** 用 runId 查找；支援精確 / 前綴 / 包含 match（沿用 ClaudeSessionFinder 策略） */
399	  async findBySessionId(
400	    sessionId: string,
401	    options: { project?: string }
402	  ): Promise<SessionFile | null>;
403	
404	  /** 取得 workflow snapshot 所屬 main session 的 project info */
405	  async getProjectInfo(sessionPath: string): Promise<ProjectInfo | null>;
406	
407	  /** 在指定專案範圍內找最新 workflow run（供 auto-switch 用） */
408	  async findLatestInProject(projectDir: string): Promise<SessionFile | null>;
409	
410	  /** 列出 workflow run（caller 為 list pipeline，與 main sessions 混合請見 §7.4） */
411	  async listSessions(options: {

413	    limit?: number;

416	```
417	
418	> **不引入新方法**——所有需求都用既有 SessionFinder 方法達成。`findLatest`、`findBySessionId` 回傳的 `SessionFile.path` 一律指向 `wf_*.json` snapshot（讓 dispatcher 後續展開 journal/agents）。`SessionFile.customTitle` 帶 `"wf:{workflowName}"`，dispatcher 用 prefix 區分。
419	
420	### 7.2 Discovery 演算法（R2-Q5：對齊既有 fuzzy filter）
421	
422	> **既有 `_collectMainSessions(options.project)` 行為**：用 `glob('**/*.jsonl').scan({ cwd: baseDir })` 列出所有專案的 main sessions，`options.project` 是 fuzzy filter — 對 file path 做 `file.toLowerCase().includes(project.toLowerCase())`。WorkflowSessionFinder 必須**完全對齊**這個語意。
423	
424	```typescript
425	// 偽碼：fuzzy filter（path-contains），不是 encodeCwdPath() exact
426	interface InternalWorkflow {
427	  file: SessionFile;            // path=snapshot, mtime, agentType='claude', customTitle='wf:...'
428	  runId: string;
429	  sessionUuid: string;
430	  status?: 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed';
431	}
432	
433	async function _collectWorkflows(
434	  options: { project?: string }
435	): Promise<InternalWorkflow[]> {
436	  // 用 glob 對等的方式直接掃描 ~/.claude/projects/**/workflows/wf_*.json
437	  const glob = new Glob('**/workflows/wf_*.json');
438	  const projectsRoot = this.baseDir;              // ~/.claude/projects
439	  const workflows: InternalWorkflow[] = [];
440	  const filenameRegex = /^(wf_[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{3})\.json$/;
441	
442	  for await (const file of glob.scan({ cwd: projectsRoot, absolute: true })) {
443	    const basename = file.split('/').pop() ?? '';
444	    const m = basename.match(filenameRegex);
445	    if (!m) continue;
446	
447	    // R2-Q5：fuzzy filter 對齊 _collectMainSessions
448	    if (options.project) {
449	      const needle = options.project.toLowerCase();
450	      if (!file.toLowerCase().includes(needle)) continue;
451	    }
452	
453	    // 從 path 拆出 {enc-cwd}/{UUID}/workflows/wf_*.json，取 sessionUuid
454	    const parts = file.split('/');
455	    const workflowsIdx = parts.indexOf('workflows');
456	    if (workflowsIdx < 1) continue;
457	    const sessionUuid = parts[workflowsIdx - 1]!;
458	    const runId = m[1]!;
459	
460	    let stats;
461	    try { stats = await stat(file); } catch { continue; }
462	
463	    let workflowName: string | undefined;
464	    let workflowStatus: 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed' | undefined;
465	    try {
466	      const snap = JSON.parse(await Bun.file(file).text());
467	      workflowName = snap.workflowName ?? snap.meta?.name;
468	      workflowStatus = snap.status;
469	    } catch {
470	      /* snapshot 讀失敗忽略 */
471	    }
472	
473	    workflows.push({
474	      file: {
475	        path: file,
476	        mtime: stats.mtime,                       // Date instance（對齊 SessionFile）
477	        agentType: 'claude',
478	        customTitle: `wf:${workflowName ?? runId}`,
479	      },
480	      runId,
481	      sessionUuid,
482	      status: workflowStatus,
483	    });
484	  }
485	
486	  workflows.sort((a, b) => b.file.mtime.getTime() - a.file.mtime.getTime());
487	  return workflows;
488	}
489	```
490	
491	`listSessions` 映射成 `SessionListItem`：
492	
493	```typescript
494	async listSessions(options: { project?: string; limit?: number }) {
495	  const items = await this._collectWorkflows(options);
496	  const limit = options.limit ?? 20;
497	  return items.slice(0, limit).map((w) => ({
498	    ...w.file,
499	    shortId: w.runId,                       // 直接用 runId（已是短形式 wf_8hex-3hex）
500	    // R4-S2: project 欄用 encoded project dir（路徑 `~/.claude/projects/{encoded}/` 的目錄名），
501	    //         對齊既有 `_collectMainSessions` 的「父目錄名」邏輯。sessionUuid 走 NOTES 欄（§11.3）。
502	    project: deriveEncodedProjectDir(w.file.path),  // 從 snapshot path 拆出 encoded dir 名
503	    logType: 'workflow' as const,
504	    workflowRunId: w.runId,
505	    workflowSessionUuid: w.sessionUuid,
506	    workflowStatus: w.status,
507	  }));
508	}
509	
510	// 從 ~/.claude/projects/{encoded}/{UUID}/workflows/wf_*.json 拆出 {encoded}
511	function deriveEncodedProjectDir(snapshotPath: string): string {
512	  const parts = snapshotPath.split('/');
513	  // ['', 'Users', 'x', '.claude', 'projects', '{encoded}', '{UUID}', 'workflows', 'wf_*.json']
514	  const projectsIdx = parts.indexOf('projects');
515	  return projectsIdx >= 0 ? parts[projectsIdx + 1] ?? '' : '';
516	}
517	```
518	
519	### 7.3 與既有 `ClaudeSessionFinder` 的關係（R2-B3 修正）
520	
521	> **R2-B3 修正**：既有 `ClaudeSessionFinder`（`src/agents/claude/claude-agent.ts:33`）是**非 `export`** 的，且**沒有 `getProjectInfo` 方法**。本 SPEC **不**假設委派路徑可用。
522	
523	**P2 必做**：
524	
525	1. 將 `class ClaudeSessionFinder` 改為 `export class ClaudeSessionFinder`
526	2. 在 `ClaudeSessionFinder` 補上 `getProjectInfo(sessionPath: string): Promise<ProjectInfo | null>`（從既有 `readCwdFromHead` helper 包一下，加上 displayName 推斷）
527	3. 在 `ClaudeSessionFinder` 補上 `findLatestInProject(projectDir: string): Promise<SessionFile | null>`（既有似乎也沒實作，需驗證）
528	
529	`WorkflowSessionFinder` 之後可：
530	
531	- **共用** path 編碼工具（`baseDir = ~/.claude/projects`、glob 形式）
532	- **委派** `getProjectInfo(snapshotPath)` — 先從 `snapshotPath` 路徑反推到對應的 main session JSONL 路徑（用 `{enc-cwd}/{UUID}/workflows/wf_*.json` → `{enc-cwd}/{UUID}.jsonl`），再呼叫 `ClaudeSessionFinder.getProjectInfo(mainPath)`
533	
534	### 7.4 `--list` 整合（R2-B2 + Q4 修正）
535	
536	> **Q4 決議**：保持既有 `--list` 預設語意——列**所有專案** main session + workflow run，`-p <project>` 是 fuzzy filter。`parser.ts:127` 對 `--list --all` 的禁止維持不變（Q2）。
537	>
538	> **R2-B2 修正**：`ClaudeSessionFinder.listSessions(options)` 預設行為已是「所有專案」（透過 `_collectMainSessions` 內部不指定 cwd 過濾）。本 SPEC 直接沿用，無需新增 cwd 限制。
539	
540	**解法**：**ClaudeSessionFinder（既有）內部負責合併**：
541	
542	1. 列出自己的 main sessions（既有邏輯，含 enrich tail metadata）
543	2. **內部**呼叫 `this._workflowFinder.listSessions(options)`（同 `options` 傳遞 fuzzy filter）
544	3. 依 `lastActivityTime ?? mtime` 合併排序、套用 `limit`
545	4. 回傳
546	
547	```typescript
548	// ClaudeSessionFinder.listSessions 改動偽碼（既有檔案 src/agents/claude/claude-agent.ts:113）
549	async listSessions(options: { project?: string; limit?: number }) {
550	  const limit = options.limit ?? 20;
551	  // 1. 既有：main sessions（含 enrich，含 fuzzy filter）— 不傳 limit，下面合併後再切
552	  const mainItems = await this._collectMainSessionsEnriched({ project: options.project });
553	  // 2. 新增：workflows（同 options，fuzzy filter 對齊）
554	  const wfItems = await this._workflowFinder.listSessions({ project: options.project });
555	  // 3. 合併排序、切 limit
556	  const merged = [...mainItems, ...wfItems].sort((a, b) => {
557	    const ta = (a.lastActivityTime ?? a.mtime).getTime();
558	    const tb = (b.lastActivityTime ?? b.mtime).getTime();
559	    return tb - ta;
560	  });
561	  return merged.slice(0, limit);
562	}
563	```
564	
565	> 既有 `listSessions` 邏輯：先 slice(limit) 再 enrich。改動：先 enrich main + 取 workflow → 合併 → slice。Workflow snapshot 已內含 metadata，不需要 enrich。
566	
567	**T1/T2 acceptance**（Q4 修正版）：
568	
569	- **T1**: `agent-tail claude --list` 列**所有專案**的 main session + workflow run（沿用既有預設）
570	- **T2**: `agent-tail claude --list -p <project>` 對 path 做 fuzzy 包含過濾，正確顯示符合的 main session + workflow（兩家 filter 語意一致）
571	
572	`WorkflowSessionFinder` **仍**作為 first-class source（被 `--workflow` dispatcher、`findBySessionId` 直接使用），但 list 路徑由 ClaudeSessionFinder 統一聚合。
573

592	## 8. Parsers
593	
594	### 8.1 JournalLineParser（`src/claude-workflow/journal-parser.ts`）
595	
596	實作 `LineParser`，解析 journal.jsonl 每一行。
597	
598	**Timestamp 處理（B6 修正）**：journal events 本身**不帶 timestamp**。解決方式：
599	
600	- **歷史回放（initial dump）**：parser 接收的每行用「**file order**」順序輸出——既有 `FileWatcher` 是 sequential read，行序即時間序。`timestamp` 欄位填 file mtime 的 ISO 字串（雖然全部行共享同一個 mtime，但 file order 已隱含順序）。
601	- **即時 tail**：新行接收當下用 `new Date().toISOString()`——此時時間是真的接收時間，不影響歷史排序。
602	- **與 agent transcript 的 interleave**：journal events 與 agent-\*.jsonl 行**不**做精確時間 interleave。每個 source 內部維持 file order，跨 source 間以 label 區分顯示（已足夠 UX）。T4 acceptance 改寫：「**每個來源內部依 file order 顯示**」（非「全域時間 interleave」）。
603	
604	```typescript
605	export class JournalLineParser implements LineParser {
606	  /** caller 在 attach 時設定 file mtime 作為歷史 timestamp 基準 */
607	  private historyTimestamp: string;
608	
609	  constructor(opts: { fileMtime?: Date } = {}) {
610	    this.historyTimestamp = (opts.fileMtime ?? new Date()).toISOString();
611	  }
612	
613	  /** FileWatcher 進入 tail 模式時呼叫，切換 timestamp 來源 */
614	  markLiveMode(): void {
615	    this.historyTimestamp = '';
616	  }
617	
618	  parse(rawLine: string): ParsedLine | null {
619	    let event: JournalEvent;
620	    try {
621	      event = JSON.parse(rawLine);
622	    } catch {
623	      return null;                                          // 容錯（B-T18）
624	    }
625	
626	    if (event.type !== 'started' && event.type !== 'result') return null;
627	    if (typeof event.key !== 'string') return null;
628	    if (typeof event.agentId !== 'string') return null;
629	
630	    const shortAgentId = event.agentId.slice(0, 7);
631	    const isStart = event.type === 'started';
632	    const formatted = isStart
633	      ? chalk.cyan(`▶ agent ${shortAgentId} started`)
634	      : chalk.green(`✓ agent ${shortAgentId} result`) +
635	        (typeof event.result === 'string'
636	          ? ': ' + truncateLine(event.result, 100)
637	          : ': ' + truncateLine(JSON.stringify(event.result), 100));
638	
639	    return {
640	      type: 'system',
641	      timestamp: this.historyTimestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
642	      raw: event,
643	      formatted,
644	      workflowEvent: event.type,
645	      workflowAgentId: event.agentId,
646	    };
647	  }
648	
649	  // Stateless（除了 historyTimestamp flag）— 沒有 currentMessageState 需要維護
650	}
651	```
652	
653	### 8.2 SnapshotWatcher（`src/claude-workflow/snapshot-watcher.ts`）
654	
655	**不實作 LineParser**（snapshot 不是 line-based）。獨立元件，類似
656	FileWatcher 但 reload 整檔。
657	
658	```typescript
659	import { watch } from 'node:fs';
660	import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises';
661	
662	export interface SnapshotWatcherConfig {
663	  path: string;
664	  onChange: (snapshot: WorkflowSnapshot) => void;
665	  onError?: (err: Error) => void;
666	  debounceMs?: number; // default 50
667	}
668	
669	export class SnapshotWatcher {
670	  private watcher: ReturnType<typeof watch> | null = null;
671	  private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
672	  private lastJson: string | null = null; // 變更去重
673	
674	  constructor(private config: SnapshotWatcherConfig) {}
675	
676	  async start(): Promise<void> {
677	    // 啟動立即讀一次
678	    await this.reload();
679	
680	    this.watcher = watch(this.config.path, () => {
681	      if (this.debounceTimer) clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);
682	      this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
683	        void this.reload();
684	      }, this.config.debounceMs ?? 50);
685	    });
686	  }
687	
688	  private async reload(): Promise<void> {
689	    try {
690	      const json = await readFile(this.config.path, 'utf8');
691	      if (json === this.lastJson) return; // 內容沒變不通知
692	      this.lastJson = json;
693	      const snapshot = JSON.parse(json) as WorkflowSnapshot;
694	      this.config.onChange(snapshot);
695	    } catch (err) {
696	      this.config.onError?.(err as Error);
697	    }
698	  }
699	
700	  stop(): void {
701	    this.watcher?.close();
702	    this.watcher = null;
703	    if (this.debounceTimer) clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);
704	  }
705	}
706	```
707	
708	### 8.3 重用 ClaudeLineParser
709	
710	Workflow 內 `agent-*.jsonl` 直接交給 `new ClaudeLineParser({ verbose })` 處理。
711	這在 watch-builder 中為每個 workflow subagent 各建立一個 parser instance。
712	
713	## 9. WorkflowDetector
714	
715	**檔案**：`src/claude-workflow/workflow-detector.ts`
716	
717	對應 `src/claude/subagent-detector.ts` 的角色，但範圍是 workflow。
718	
719	> **Q1 決議**：普通模式（`agent-tail claude`，不帶 `--workflow`）**預設啟用** workflow detection ——只要在 main session 偵測到 Workflow tool_use，自動 attach。`CliOptions.workflowAttach: true` 為預設；`--no-workflow-attach` 可關閉。
720	
721	### 9.1 雙路徑偵測（B5 + B7 修正）
722	
723	**Path A — Early detection from main JSONL（無 fs latency）**：
724	
725	agent-tail 已經在 tail main session JSONL。Detector **不額外開檔監看**，而是提供 `handleMainLine(parsed: ParsedLine)` 方法給 main session 的 onLine handler 呼叫。Trigger 條件：
726	
727	1. `parsed.workflowAsyncLaunch` 非空（由 `ClaudeLineParser` 從 `toolUseResult.status === "async_launched"` 解出，含 `runId / transcriptDir / scriptPath / summary`）
728	2. **同步**檢查 + 加入 `knownRunIds`（B5 race fix，見下方 §9.1.1）
729	3. 觸發 `onNewWorkflow({ runId, transcriptDir, scriptPath, summary })`
730	
731	> `parsed.isWorkflowToolUse`（assistant tool_use）只用來在 logger 提示「workflow launching...」，不觸發 attach（因為此時還沒有 runId）。
732	
733	**Path B — Directory watch fallback（舊 session resume / async tool_result 缺失場景）**：
734	
735	```typescript
736	// 對 {session}/workflows/ 做 fs.watch（non-recursive）
737	const watcher = watch(workflowsDir, (eventType, filename) => {
738	  if (!filename) return;
739	  const m = filename.match(/^(wf_[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{3})\.json$/);
740	  if (!m) return;
741	  const runId = m[1]!;
742	  if (!this.markRunIdKnown(runId)) return;                  // 同步守門（B5）
743	
744	  // R4-S1: 用 IIFE try/finally + success flag，rollback 一定觸發
745	  void (async () => {
746	    let succeeded = false;
747	    try {
748	      await this.tryHandleNewWorkflow(runId, /* retries */ 10);
749	      succeeded = true;
750	    } catch (err) {
751	      this.config.outputHandler.debug(
752	        `[workflow-detector] path B attach failed for ${runId}: ${err}`
753	      );
754	    } finally {
755	      if (!succeeded) {
756	        // Q8 + R4-S1：保證 rollback——即使 tryHandleNewWorkflow throw 同步 / async 都收得到
757	        this.knownRunIds.delete(runId);
758	        this.config.outputHandler.debug(
759	          `[workflow-detector] rolled back ${runId} (path A may retry)`
760	        );
761	      }
762	    }
763	  })();
764	});
765	```
766	
767	#### 9.1.1 同步 mark 機制（B5 race fix）
768	
769	```typescript
770	class WorkflowDetector {
771	  private knownRunIds = new Set<string>();
772	
773	  /**
774	   * 同步檢查 + 加入。回傳 true 表示是新發現（caller 才繼續處理）；
775	   * false 表示已知（caller 直接 return）。**單一原子操作**，杜絕 race。
776	   */
777	  markRunIdKnown(runId: string): boolean {
778	    if (this.knownRunIds.has(runId)) return false;
779	    this.knownRunIds.add(runId);
780	    return true;
781	  }
782	
783	  handleMainLine(parsed: ParsedLine): void {
784	    const launch = parsed.workflowAsyncLaunch;
785	    if (!launch) return;
786	    if (!this.markRunIdKnown(launch.runId)) return;        // ← 同步守門
787	    this.config.onNewWorkflow({
788	      runId: launch.runId,
789	      transcriptDir: launch.transcriptDir,
790	      snapshotPath: this.resolveSnapshotPath(launch.runId),
791	      scriptPath: launch.scriptPath,
792	      summary: launch.summary,
793	    });
794	  }
795	}
796	```
797	
798	JS 是 single-threaded，`has()` + `add()` 連續執行間不會被插斷 — 兩條路徑無論誰先到都只會有一條通過 `markRunIdKnown`。
799	
800	### 9.2 整合 main session onLine handler（B7 + R2-B4 修正）
801	
802	**問題**：T9/T10 要求普通 `agent-tail claude` 也能自動 attach workflow。原 SPEC 只描述 workflow-mode 內的 handler，沒講普通模式怎麼接 detector。
803	
804	**對齊既有結構**（`src/claude/watch-builder.ts:94-191` 實際長相）：
805

843	### 9.3 Workflow subagent 偵測（雙層 dir watch）
844	
845	每個 `DetectedWorkflow` attach 後啟動一個 inner watcher，**初始掃描與 fs.watch 事件都必須走 §10.2 `WorkflowAttachment.attachAgent` 內部的 `knownAgentIds` 同步守門**（S7）——`attachAgent` 開頭就 `knownAgentIds.has(agentId)` check，新 agentId 才實際 attach。同一 agent 不會被雙觸發。
846	
847	```typescript
848	function watchWorkflowSubagents(attachment: WorkflowAttachment, workflow: DetectedWorkflow) {
849	  const dir = workflow.transcriptDir;                      // .../subagents/workflows/wf_*/
850	
851	  // 1) 立即掃描現有 agent-*.jsonl（每個都走 attachAgent → 內含同步守門）
852	  void scanAndAttachExistingAgents(attachment, dir);
853	
854	  // 2) 持續監聽新檔案
855	  const watcher = watch(dir, (eventType, filename) => {
856	    if (!filename) return;
857	    const m = filename.match(/^agent-([0-9a-f]{17})\.jsonl$/);
858	    if (!m) return;
859	    const agentId = m[1]!;
860	    const transcriptPath = join(dir, filename);
861	    // attachAgent 內部 `if (knownAgentIds.has(agentId)) return;` — 雙重來源 race-safe（S7）
862	    void tryAttachAgentWithRetry(attachment, agentId, transcriptPath, 10);
863	  });
864	
865	  return watcher;     // caller 存進 WorkflowAttachment.subagentDirWatcher
866	}
867	```
868	
869	### 9.4 與既有 Claude SubagentDetector 的衝突（T17 修正）
870	
871	**問題**：既有 SubagentDetector 監聽 `{session}/subagents/` 目錄。`subagents/` 下面除了 `agent-*.jsonl` 還會有 `workflows/` 子目錄。
872	
873	**修正點**（`src/claude/subagent-detector.ts`）：
874	
875	- 既有 `scanForNewSubagents` 用 `Bun.Glob('agent-*.jsonl').scan({ cwd: subagentsDir })`——`Bun.Glob` 預設 **non-recursive**，不會吃到 `workflows/` 內檔案，**但** glob 不會主動跳過子目錄 dirent。
876	- `tryAddSubagentFile`／`scanForNewSubagents` 內部**明確加** `if (file.includes('/')) continue;` 守門（保護萬一 glob behavior 改變）。
877	- 既有 `fs.watch(subagentsDir, ...)` 是 non-recursive，但會收到 `workflows/` 子目錄變動的事件——filename 會是 `'workflows'` 字串，正則 `^agent-[...]\.jsonl$` 不會 match，已自然濾掉。
878	
879	**T17 acceptance fixture**：
880	
881	```
882	tests/integration/fixtures/mixed-subagents/
883	├── subagents/
884	│   ├── agent-aaaaaaa.jsonl                       ← 應被 ClaudeSubagentDetector 收
885	│   └── workflows/
886	│       └── wf_test01-abc/
887	│           ├── journal.jsonl
888	│           └── agent-bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb.jsonl     ← 應被 WorkflowDetector 收，不應出現在 main subagent 清單
889	```
890	
891	驗證：`scanForNewSubagents(subagentsDir, new Set())` 回傳長度 = 1（`aaaaaaa`），不含 17-hex agentId。

896

901	}
902

904	  journal: WatchedFile;                    // journal.jsonl
905	  snapshot: { path: string };              // wf_*.json (給 SnapshotWatcher，非 FileWatcher)
906	  agents: WatchedFile[];                   // 初始掃描到的 agent-*.jsonl
907	}
908	
909	export function buildWorkflowFiles(config: BuildWorkflowFilesConfig): WorkflowFiles;
910	```
911	
912	### 10.2 `WorkflowAttachment` — 單一 workflow 的生命週期 handle（S5 修正）
913	
914	> **問題**：原 SPEC 直接把 workflow journal/agents 推給共用 `MultiFileWatcher`，但 `MultiFileWatcher.stop()` 是全停。T20 要求 workflow 結束 / 目錄消失時**只**終止該 workflow 的監看，主程式不退出。
915	
916	每個 attached workflow 用一個獨立 `WorkflowAttachment` 物件包起它自己的 watchers：
917	
918	```typescript
919	import type {
920	  OutputHandler,         // { info, warn, error, debug }（src/core/detector-interfaces.ts:10）
921	  SessionHandler,        // { addSession?, markSessionDone?, updateUI? }（同檔:24）
922	} from '../core/detector-interfaces.ts';
923	
924	export interface WorkflowAttachmentConfig {
925	  workflow: DetectedWorkflow;
926	  withAgents: boolean;
927	  snapshotState: { current: WorkflowSnapshot | null };
928	  parsers: Map<string, LineParser>;        // key='journal' 或 agentId
929	  formatter: Formatter;
930	
931	  /** 一般輸出（journal 行 / agent transcript 行 / status event）— 沿用既有 watch-builder 的 `onOutput` 命名 */
932	  onOutput: (formatted: string, label: string) => void;
933	
934	  /** 系統訊息（attach / detach / errors）— 既有 `OutputHandler` 物件（不是函式！） */
935	  outputHandler: OutputHandler;
936	
937	  /** Interactive 模式整合（non-interactive 時為 undefined） */
938	  sessionHandler?: SessionHandler;
939	
940	  verbose: boolean;
941	}
942	
943	export class WorkflowAttachment {
944	  private journalWatcher!: FileWatcher;
945	  private agentWatchers = new Map<string, FileWatcher>(); // agentId -> watcher
946	  private snapshotWatcher!: SnapshotWatcher;
947	  private subagentDirWatcher: ReturnType<typeof watch> | null = null;
948	  private knownAgentIds = new Set<string>();    // 同步守門（B5 同款）
949	  private stopped = false;
950	
951	  constructor(private config: WorkflowAttachmentConfig) {}
952	
953	  /**
954	   * R3-B4 修正 — 嚴格順序：history dump 全部完成才開放 SnapshotWatcher onChange 觸發 stop。
955	   *
956	   * 順序：
957	   *   1) journal FileWatcher.start() → 等初始 batch dump 完 → 呼叫 journalParser.markLiveMode() (S9)
958	   *   2) 初始掃描現有 agent-*.jsonl → await attachAgent() × N（每個 FileWatcher 等初始 batch dump 完）

961	   *      stop('completed')—— 因為前面 batch 已 dump 完。
962	   *   5) 若預讀時 status 已是 completed/failed → SnapshotWatcher 預讀同步把 snapshot 灌入 onChange
963	   *      → onChange 看到 completed → queueMicrotask(stop)。dump 早於 stop 因為 stop 排在 microtask 尾巴。
964	   */
965	  async start(): Promise<void> {
966	    // R5-S2 — Step 0: transcriptDir 容錯重試
967	    // Early detection 收到 `async_launched` tool_result 時，{subagents/workflows/wf_*/}

996	   */
997	  async attachAgent(agentId: string, transcriptPath: string): Promise<void> {
998	    if (this.knownAgentIds.has(agentId)) return;
999	    this.knownAgentIds.add(agentId);
1000	
1001	    let succeeded = false;
1002	    try {

1004	      /* Interactive 模式：通知 sessionHandler 加 tab */

1010	      this.config.sessionHandler?.updateUI?.();
1011	      succeeded = true;

1013	      if (!succeeded) {

1019	      }

1024	  async stop(
1025	    reason: 'completed' | 'directory-removed' | 'user'
1026	  ): Promise<void> {
1027	    if (this.stopped) return;
1028	    this.stopped = true;
1029	    this.snapshotWatcher.stop();
1030	    this.subagentDirWatcher?.close();
1031	    await this.journalWatcher.stop();
1032	    await Promise.all(
1033	      [...this.agentWatchers.values()].map((w) => w.stop())
1034	    );
1035	    // Interactive：通知 SessionHandler 各 agent / journal session done
1036	    for (const agentId of this.knownAgentIds) {
1037	      this.config.sessionHandler?.markSessionDone?.(agentId);
1038	    }
1039	    this.config.sessionHandler?.markSessionDone?.(
1040	      `wf:${this.config.workflow.runId}`
1041	    );

1043	    this.config.outputHandler.info(
1044	      `[wf:${this.config.workflow.runId}] stopped (${reason})`
1045	    );
1046	  }
1047	}

1049	
1050	`startClaudeWorkflowMultiWatch` / `startClaudeInteractiveWatch` 持有 `Map<runId, WorkflowAttachment>`；新 workflow 偵測 → 建立 WorkflowAttachment 並 start；snapshot status 變 `completed`/`failed` 或 directory `ENOENT` → 對應 attachment `stop()`。
1051	
1052	**`MultiFileWatcher` 不改**——本 SPEC 不依賴 MultiFileWatcher 的 dynamic add/remove；每個 workflow attachment 內部直接用 `FileWatcher`（既有 `src/core/file-watcher.ts`），更貼合 lifecycle 需求。
1053	
1054	**Interactive mode 與 SessionHandler**：`startClaudeWorkflowInteractiveWatch` 把 `SessionManager` 包成 `SessionHandler`（`{ addSession, markSessionDone, updateUI }`）注入到所有 `WorkflowAttachment`。journal pane 用 `addSession('wf:' + runId, ...)` 註冊；每個 workflow agent 用 `addSession(agentId, ...)`。Tab 切換、Display 更新照既有路徑走（§12）。
1055	
1056	### 10.3 `createWorkflowOnLineHandler`
1057	
1058	每個 workflow attachment 的 onLine：
1059	
1060	1. **journal line** → JournalLineParser → 格式化 → 顯示為 `[wf:<runName>]` label
1061	2. **agent transcript line** → 該 agent 的 ClaudeLineParser → 格式化 → 顯示為 `[wf:<agentLabel>]`
1062	3. **label 對應**：用 `snapshotState.current?.workflowProgress` 內 label 對應 agentId；snapshot 還沒讀到 label 時 fallback 顯示 `[wf:adca0c3]` 短 hash。
1063	
1064	```typescript
1065	export function createWorkflowOnLineHandler(
1066	  config: WorkflowAttachmentConfig
1067	): (line: string, label: string) => void;
1068	```
1069	
1070	### 10.4 `startClaudeWorkflowWatch`（`src/index.ts`）
1071	
1072	新增 dispatcher：
1073	
1074	```typescript
1075	// main() 內，agentType === 'claude' 分支
1076	const wantsWorkflowMode = options.workflow !== undefined ||
1077	  (sessionFile?.customTitle?.startsWith('wf:') === true);   // findBySessionId 走進 wf_*
1078	
1079	if (wantsWorkflowMode) {
1080	  if (options.interactive) {
1081	    await startClaudeWorkflowInteractiveWatch(options);
1082	  } else {
1083	    await startClaudeWorkflowMultiWatch(options);
1084	  }
1085	  return;
1086	}
1087	```
1088	
1089	`startClaudeWorkflowMultiWatch`：
1090	
1091	1. WorkflowSessionFinder.findLatest 或 findBySessionId 找出 workflow run
1092	2. 建立並 start 一個 `WorkflowAttachment`
1093	3. 監聽該 attachment 的 snapshot — `status==='completed'` 時呼叫 `attachment.stop('completed')`
1094	4. 主程式持續執行直到 Ctrl-C 或 attachment.stop 完成才退出
1095	
1096	**普通模式（沒帶 --workflow）**：`startClaudeMultiWatch` 持有一個 `Map<runId, WorkflowAttachment>`；`WorkflowDetector.onNewWorkflow` callback 建立新 attachment 並插入 map。

1098	## 11. CLI Options
1099	
1100	### 11.1 新增旗標
1101	
1102	| CLI 旗標                  | Commander 鍵                  | 型別           | 預設        | 說明                                                              |
1103	| ------------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------------- | ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
1104	| `--workflow [runId]`      | `workflow`                    | `string\|true` | `undefined` | Tail workflow run；無 runId 時用最新 workflow                     |
1105	| `--with-workflow-agents`  | `withWorkflowAgents`          | `boolean`      | `true`      | 同時 tail workflow 內所有 subagent                                |
1106	| `--no-workflow-agents`    | （Commander 自動覆寫上一個鍵） | —              | —           | 關閉 `--with-workflow-agents`                                     |
1107	| `--workflow-pane`         | `workflowPane`                | `boolean`      | `false`     | tmux：為 workflow main + 每個 subagent 開 pane                    |
1108	| `--no-workflow-attach`    | `workflowAttach`              | `boolean`      | `true`      | 普通模式 escape hatch：關閉 main session 的 workflow auto-attach  |
1109	
1110	> **命名一致性（S3）**：所有 CLI 旗標 kebab-case；所有 CliOptions 欄位 camelCase。`--no-X` 用 Commander 標準語法 `option('--no-x', ...)` 自動產生 `x: false` 覆寫。
1111	
1112	### 11.2 互斥與相容性（Q3 決議）
1113	
1114	| 組合                              | 結果                                                             |
1115	| --------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
1116	| `--workflow` + `--subagent`       | **互斥** — exit 1（不同概念）                                    |
1117	| `--workflow` + `agentType !== 'claude'` | **錯誤** — exit 1                                          |
1118	| `--workflow` + `-i`               | **相容** — 走 workflow interactive 分支                          |
1119	| `--workflow-pane` + `-i`          | **互斥**（Q3 決議，與既有 `--pane` + `-i` 互斥規則一致）— exit 1 |
1120	| `--workflow-pane` + `--pane`      | **互斥** — exit 1（語意重疊；pane 數量無法協調）                 |
1121	| `--workflow` 不帶 runId + 當前 cwd 無 workflow | **錯誤** — exit 1，hint：「使用 `--list` 或 `--workflow <runId>`」（Q7：範圍 = 當前 cwd，不跨專案 fallback） |
1122	| `--workflow` 不帶 runId 帶 `-p <project>` | 走 fuzzy filter；若仍無 workflow → exit 1 |
1123	
1124	> **R4-B1 修正：cwd → fuzzy filter 轉換**
1125	>
1126	> Claude project 目錄名稱是 encoded form（`/Users/x/code/foo` → `-Users-x-code-foo`），**raw `process.cwd()` 不會是 encoded path 的 substring**。Dispatcher 在處理 `--workflow` 不帶 runId 時，必須先把 cwd 編碼成 Claude project dir 形式，再傳入 `options.project` 做 fuzzy `includes` 過濾。
1127	>
1128	> 新增 helper（建議放 `src/claude-workflow/paths.ts`，與 SubagentDetector 共用）：
1129	>

1132	>  * 把 cwd 編碼成 Claude project dir 名稱片段。
1133	>  * `/Users/pc035860/code/agent-tail` → `-Users-pc035860-code-agent-tail`
1134	>  * 規則：所有 `/` 替換成 `-`（path 開頭的 `/` 自然產生前綴 `-`）。
1135	>  * 與 `~/.claude/projects/` 目錄命名格式對齊。
1136	>  */
1137	> export function cwdToClaudeProjectFilter(cwd: string): string {
1138	>   return cwd.replaceAll('/', '-');
1139	> }
1140	> ```
1141	>
1142	> Dispatcher 用法：
1143	>
1144	> ```typescript

1146	>   // 不帶 runId → 範圍限縮當前 cwd
1147	>   const filter = cwdToClaudeProjectFilter(process.cwd());
1148	>   const wf = await finder.findLatest({ project: filter });
1149	>   if (!wf) { /* exit 1 with hint */ }
1150	> }

1152	| `--list` + `--all`                | **保持禁止**（Q2 決議，沿用 `parser.ts:127`）                    |
1153	| `--no-workflow-attach` + `--workflow` | 允許但無效果（已是 workflow mode）— 印一行 warning            |

1161	wf    wf_6f7d9da9-37e     2026-05-30 14:27  briefshare-impl                  completed · in session 5fe53568
1162	sess  5fe53568            2026-05-30 14:21  (no custom title)
1163	sess  d581d8c7            2026-05-30 09:30  (no custom title)
1164	```
1165	
1166	- 第 1 欄 `TYPE`：`sess` | `wf`，依 `logType`（未設視為 `sess`）
1167	- 第 5 欄 `NOTES`：workflow 顯示 `workflowStatus` + 所屬 main session 短 UUID
1168	
1169	### 11.4 `agent-pick` 選 workflow 的路由（S4 + R3-S1）
1170	
1171	agent-pick 顯示與 `--list` 相同欄位（fzf preview）。
1172	
1173	**fzf 行格式契約**（R3-S1 — 明確規定，給 `src/pick/fzf-helpers.ts` 解析）：
1174	
1175	```
1176	{TYPE}\t{ID}\t{TIME}\t{TITLE}\t{NOTES}\t{HIDDEN_RUNID_OR_UUID}
1177	```
1178	
1179	- 6 欄、tab 分隔
1180	- 第 6 欄 `HIDDEN_RUNID_OR_UUID`：對 main session 為 full UUID；對 workflow 為 full runId（`wf_8hex-3hex`）
1181	- fzf 用 `--with-nth 1..5` 顯示前 5 欄；第 6 欄保留給 parser 用
1182	- **R4-S3 一致性**：preview action / Enter / Ctrl-Y 全部用 `awk -F'\t' '{print $6}'` 取第 6 欄；不再用 `{1}` / `{2}`（避免顯示欄與資料欄混淆）
1183	
1184	**選定後路由**（依**第 1 欄 TYPE**判斷）：
1185	
1186	- `TYPE === 'sess'` → 既有路徑 `agent-tail <agentType> <第 6 欄 UUID>`
1187	- `TYPE === 'wf'`   → spawn `agent-tail claude --workflow <第 6 欄 runId>`
1188	
1189	選 workflow 時若使用者在 fzf 行尾按特定鍵（保留：未來可支援 `--workflow-pane` / `-i` 變體），目前 MVP 固定 `--workflow <runId>` 無附加旗標。
